name: cq
description: Shared knowledge commons for AI agents; find, share, and confirm collective knowledge to stop rediscovering the same failures.

interface.shortDescription: Shared knowledge commons for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Find, share, and confirm collective knowledge so agents stop rediscovering the same failures.
defaultPrompt: Query cq before integrating an unfamiliar API.
Use cq to reflect on this session and propose reusable insights.
